import { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { Link, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; export default function Tile() { const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { const token = localStorage.getItem("authToken"); if (token) { setIsLoggedIn(true); } }); return (
{isLoggedIn} && (
